limitations: Schema snapshot compares stable evidence-ledger metadata only.
Snapshot comparison is review evidence only, not parser semantic correctness, CI, merge, or deploy authority.
V1 does not read golden replay, feature-equity, diagnostics, drift, runtime, workbook, or model-provider artifacts.
